calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-20-2015 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Granting Of Default Judgement
Off Calendar Mar-26-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Charles Crompton, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Mitch Lyon, #6848

Joseph H. Schieffer, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff, STONESTOWN SHOPPIN CENTER, L.P.
No appearance by defaulted defendant(s) MICKSTER & CO.
Default of Defendant(s) has been duly entered.

John Petersen sworn and examinded on behalf of Plaintiff.
After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant(s) as follows:

Damages: $46,215.62
Pre-Judgment Interest: $2,755.13
Attorney's Fees: $6,871.56
Costs: $539.50
Total Judgment in the amount of $56,381.81
Judgment signed in open court.
